description: Official LaTeX abstract/short-paper template for the International Conference on Information Technology: New Generations (ITNG). Provides a one-column Springer-journal layout with a branded manuscript header box and logo, multi-author/multi-affiliation title blocks with corresponding/contributing-author email handling, keyword listing, table and equation formatting, algorithm/pseudocode support, appendices, and Springer's numbered bibliography style, based on the svjour3 document class.
